Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the methyltransferase superfamily. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=N-demethylindolmycin + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = indolmycin + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:24726, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:91178, ChEBI:CHEBI:91179; EC=2.1.1.328; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:25730866};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Involved in the biosynthesis of the antibiotic indolmycin, an inhibitor of the bacterial tryptophan-tRNA synthetases. Catalyzes the methylation of N-demethylindolmycin to yield indolmycin, with S-adenosylmethionine (AdoMet) acting as the methyl donor. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:25730866}.
